hero.title: About
hero.description: We create practical, functional AI tools to help
hero.descriptionEnd: be more productive and scale without friction.

origin.label: Genesis
origin.title: Our Origin Story
origin.paragraph1: WAZA was born from a simple observation: most AI solutions
origin.paragraph1Highlight: don't land in the day-to-day of businesses
origin.paragraph1End: . They live in demos and presentations, but don't solve real problems.
origin.paragraph2: We are a team that blends
origin.paragraph2End: to create tools that work. Ready-to-use products, custom development, and training so your team masters AI instead of depending on it.

nameMeaning.title: The Meaning Behind Our Name
nameMeaning.intro: WAZA is not an acronym. It's a word that exists in several languages, and in each one it means something different:
nameMeaning.japaneseEnd: represents technique elevated to art—the mastery of the craftsman
nameMeaning.englishEnd: who understand each other without explanation
nameMeaning.swahiliHighlight: to imagine what doesn't yet exist
nameMeaning.summaryHighlight: technique, connection, imagination, and a touch of humor
nameMeaning.summaryEnd: . We blend ingenuity and knowledge to solve problems with solutions that work.

manifesto.label: Philosophy
manifesto.title: The WAZA Manifesto
manifesto.subtitle: Waza transcends simple definition.
manifesto.belief1End: are not opposing forces—they are complementary. The true master works with such fluency that creation becomes joyful. The expert at play discovers innovations that methodical work alone cannot reveal.
manifesto.belief2: We believe that the pinnacle of user experience is found in
manifesto.belief2End: . Products should not merely function—they should bring joy. Technology should feel less like a tool and more like an extension of human creativity.
manifesto.belief3Highlight: AI and humanity grow stronger together
manifesto.belief3End: . Not as master and servant, but as collaborators in an ongoing dialogue. Each amplifying the other's strengths, each compensating for the other's limitations.
manifesto.belief4End: . Cohesive ecosystems that evolve and respond. Living systems that grow more valuable and more capable with time.
manifesto.belief5Highlight: craftspeople with a sense of humor
manifesto.belief5End: . We are engineers who dream beyond constraints. We are artists who build with logic and code.
manifesto.belief6End: —technology that enhances itself. We are developing companies that will transcend today's giants. We are writing the future, one line of code at a time.
manifesto.closingSubtext: And we're creating a cooler world.

mission.label: Purpose
mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.missionText: To transform the digital landscape by creating
mission.missionMiddle: that seamlessly blend technological brilliance with human creativity, pushing the boundaries of what's possible while maintaining a spirit of
mission.visionHighlight1: AI and human intelligence amplify each other
mission.visionMiddle: , creating products and companies that exceed traditional growth trajectories while making technology more

technicalMastery.title: Technical Mastery
technicalMastery.descriptionEnd: , refining technical skill to the level of artistry. We build with precision, attention to detail, and deep understanding.

creativePlayfulness.title: Creative Playfulness
creativePlayfulness.description: We approach challenges with a spirit of
creativePlayfulness.descriptionEnd: . We believe the most innovative solutions emerge when work feels like play.

humanAiCollaboration.title: Human-AI Collaboration
humanAiCollaboration.descriptionHighlight: human and artificial intelligence enhance each other
humanAiCollaboration.descriptionEnd: , with each contributing their unique strengths to create outcomes neither could achieve alone.

kaizen.title: Kaizen
kaizen.descriptionEnd: in everything we do. Every day, every project, and every interaction is an opportunity to make small, meaningful changes that compound over time.

recursiveImprovement.title: Recursive Improvement
recursiveImprovement.descriptionEnd: , continuously evolving and adapting rather than becoming obsolete.

globalPerspective.title: Global Perspective
globalPerspective.descriptionEnd: and perspectives, recognizing that the richest innovations come from the intersection of different worldviews.

aiNative.title: AI-Native Foundation
aiNative.description: Unlike providers that add AI capabilities to existing approaches, WAZA builds with
aiNative.descriptionHighlight: artificial intelligence as a foundational element
aiNative.descriptionEnd: , enabling systems that continuously learn and adapt based on interactions.

technicalCreative.title: Technical-Creative Fusion
technicalCreative.description: In contrast to the industry's typical separation of technical and creative concerns, WAZA
technicalCreative.descriptionHighlight: integrates these dimensions from the outset
technicalCreative.descriptionEnd: , creating solutions that are both technically excellent and emotionally engaging.

selfRecursive.title: Self-Recursive Improvement
selfRecursive.description: While conventional solutions require ongoing maintenance and eventual replacement, WAZA creates
selfRecursive.descriptionEnd: , delivering increasing value over time rather than depreciation.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem Thinking
ecosystem.description: Instead of building isolated products or features, WAZA develops
ecosystem.descriptionEnd: —solutions designed as platforms rather than fixed products, with components that interact to create emergent capabilities.

waysOfWorking.title: Ways of Working
waysOfWorking.description: Designed for speed, quality, and learning.

committedOutcomes.title: Committed Outcomes
committedOutcomes.item1: Self-improving platforms that get better daily
committedOutcomes.item2: Clear impact on growth, cost, and experience

cta.label: Contact
cta.title: Let's Talk
cta.descriptionHighlight: A conversation to understand if we can help you.
